branches.name: plus
branches.changelog:
v1.5.0 (plus)

Global:
- All GSX resource files are now located in `valve_gsx` directory
- steam_legacy requirement is no longer necessary

Engine:
- Added `-borderless` alias for `-noborder`
- Added internal `FCVAR_READONLY` flag
- Added read-only gsx_version cvar
- Added Discord Rich Presence integration (supports all official games + AG)
- Added Steam Rich Presence integration (available with specific clients)
- Added `-lang` launch argument for language forcing (ex. `-lang japanese`)
- Added `_gsx` search path as primary basedir/another addon directory
- Added support for `UseScaledCreditsFont` resource string
- Software: implemented "fit" option for startup graphic
- Implemented workaround for svc_bad in demos (active with `developer 1`)
- Reverted `-userawinput` launch argument (no need anymore)
- Fixed SystemWrapper command forwarder (fixes dem_ commands)
- Disabled keyboard input for GameUI panels during active Quake/WON console
- Now skybox updates in runtime when `sv_skyname` changes on server-side
- Allowed `r_dynamic` in multiplayer

GameUI:
- All GameUI dialogs were scaled with HD proportional feature from HL25
- Implemented fallback for HD background loading

Steam API:
- Upgraded to v156 (HL25)

ServerBrowser:
- Added country flags before server name
- Fixed "last time played" string construction
- Fixed inability to activate game filter with uppercase mod name (gamedir)
- Fixed inability to activate game filter with same string start (ex. czero, czeror)
- Fixed gamedir filter in filter string 
- Current game will be added in any case in game filter
- Reduced server refresh interval from 10s to 600ms

VGUI2:
- Fixed scheme reloading in runtime
- Implemented HD proportional scaling like in HL25 build
- Implemented `-nohdproportional` launch argument
